subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I am Thy handmaiden who hath turned unto Thee and hearkened unto Thy most sweet call as it was raised betwixt earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انا امتک التی اقبلت الیک و سمعت ندائک الاحلی اذ ارتفع بین الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
